title: Armored Elytra (Resource Pack)
description: The accompanying resource pack for my Armored Elytra data pack
body:
# Armored Elytra (Resource Pack)

## Description

A resource pack that includes textures for all types of armored elytra.

You'll need the accompanying [data pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/armored-elytra-data-pack) for this resource pack to work.

Feel free to use this resource pack in your own project, but please credit me!

![Overview](https://github.com/abbydiode/armored-elytra/assets/16174954/006a4e32-cff3-4818-822a-ed1895423ae0)

## Installation

1. Download the resource pack then drag and drop the ZIP file into your `resourcepacks` folder. For example `%appdata%/.minecraft/resourcepacks`.
2. Enable the resource pack in the main menu.
